feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can KPRO in S/4 Public Cloud be configured for HTTPS ArchiveLink?
entry.content: can this be configured in CBC for Public Cloud to use Archivelink content servers?

entry.title: 交货单超信贷了，传OA进行特批；想把标准APP：管理已记录的信用决策(manage documented credit block)特定信息也传给OA，方便审批人做参考。特定信息如下图红框所示，特定
entry.content: 交货单超信贷了，传OA进行特批；想把标准APP：管理已记录的信用决策(manage documented credit block)特定信息也传给OA，方便审批人做参考。特定信息如下图红框所示，特定信息怎么才可以传给OA？

entry.title: 关于“工艺路线”导入模板无“报废”字段如何解决
entry.content: 如图所示，在HANA PUBLIC CLOUD中，创建工艺路线时需填入的“报废”字段（日语版本名为“不良”）（scrap），在导入模板并无该字段，并且在数据移行之后也无法更新，请问有好的解决方案吗？

entry.title: 外注について
entry.content:
外注(BMY)について

仕入先⇒加工先に原料を直送してもらう取引にて、

①自社資産に一度計上せずにB加工先の特殊在庫に計上する方法があるか。

②MRPにて生成される購買発注の納入先はB加工先としたい、そうするためのマスタ設定（購買情報マスタ etc）はどうなるか。

entry.title: Inquiry about automatic retrieval/export of payment files from SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

 

We are currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation 

 

We have noticed that when generating payment files using the "Manage Payment Media" app, it is unclear whether these files are stored in any accessible repository within SAP, or if there is any API, service, or mechanism available to automatically retrieve them from an external system.

 

Specifically, we would like to understand:

Are the files generated by the Manage Payment Media app stored in any repository within the system that can be accessed via standard services?

Is it possible to export or automatically retrieve these files (e.g., via integration or API) to an external system?

 

 

This is important because, in the current SAP R/3 system, Criteria Caixa automatically retrieves these files and stores them in an external system for further processing.

 

We would appreciate your guidance on the standard capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in this regard, and any recommended alternatives.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Report Creation for Release procedure of Purchasing Documents
entry.content:
We want to create a report for Workflow for the Purchasing Documents.

Purchase Requisition , Purchase Order , Contract , Quotation and Lean Service Entry Sheet. Data is needed about workflow.

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Reactive maintenance order (YA01) creation without notificacion
entry.content:
Hi, I’m working on the implementation of SAP S/4HANA Asset Management Public Cloud Edition. I would like to know if it is possible to create an order type YA01 without entering an associated notification.

 

Thank you in advance for your response.

entry.title: Profit Center Determination Error on FOC Sale Invoice in release accounting
entry.content:
Hi Expert

Accounting successfully releasing for single material in FOC billing.

But we are facing an error as “Balancing field "Profit Center" in GL line item 3 not filled”, while releasing accounting entry of FOC – Sales Invoice for Multiple Materials only on Public Edition by “Change Billing Document (VF02)” APP

Although the profit center is already assigned with material master.

entry.title: Error in Customer Master Migration in Migrate your Data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I encountered this error while doing the simulation of the customer master migration in the Migrate Your Data Application.

"Address with external number CCPP01KEY for partner CCPP10010 already exists"

Message Class R1, Message Number 658

I've checked the addresses in my template for both the main address in "General Data" and the additional address in the "Additional Addresses" Worksheet is different. However, the system kept throwing me with the same error message.

This is the main address.

And this is the additional address which is very different.

May I ask how can I resolved this error since the error is not relevant to the provided data at all?

Thank you for your advice on this.

Dan

entry.title: How to Get EWay Bill PDF in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have implemented EInvoicing and EWay Bill in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition through EDocument Cockpit. How to take EWay Bill PDF Print in SAP?

Is it available in EDocument Cockpit?

Kindly Help.

Regards,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Sap Public Cloud - auto population of the Confirmation Control key(CCK) based on PO type/Plant
entry.content:
Hello all,

On SAP Public cloud, at purchase order creation, is it possible to have an auto population of the Confirmation Control key(CCK) based on PO type/Plant? This was possible on SAP on-premise via customizing point in SPRO. But this does not seem present in SAP public cloud. Any advice/BADI to achieve the auto determination of the CCK? Thanks

entry.title: Sap Public Cloud - auto population of the account assignment category(AAC) in Purchase Order
entry.content:
On SAP Public cloud, at purchase order creation, is it possible to implement an auto population of the account assignment category(AAC) based on PO type.

The BADI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM does not allow modification of the field account assignment category. Any advice if it is possible to modify the AAC ? Else please let us know if we should've used another badi ?  Thanks

entry.title: Inspection lot not getting generated for customer stock using QA07
entry.content:
Users are not able to create inspection lot for reoccurring inspection type 09 using  QA07.

Material: 91000000

Batch: 10020108

entry.title: Unable to Populate SUN Field (Service User Number) in GB_CGI_XML_CT
entry.content:
Unable to Populate SUN (Service User Number)Field in GB_CGI_XML_CT

entry.title: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have extracted a SEPA file from the Starter system and we are getting a format error when uploading it into the bank. The file should be version pain.001.001.03 and the system generates a version pain.001.001.09 file.
Reviewing the SAP documentation for SPAIN we see that the CGI format we are using should output pain.001.001.03:

 

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreciation calculation Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

As part of our fixed assets migration, we are experiencing an issue with the depreciation calculation.

The assets in question are being migrated during the fiscal year, and the Legacy Data Transfer Settings have been configured in the application “Make Company Code Settings – Asset Accounting Specific”, with a Transfer Date of 30/04/2025.

However, after migrating the assets, we noticed that the depreciation calculation started from 01/01/2025 instead of from period 04/2025.

Upon reviewing the assets post-migration, we found that the Asset Value Date was set to 01/01/2025, even though we did not populate this field in the migration template. We believe that this field is the root cause of the issue.

Could you please clarify how this field is derived?

For your information, we filled in the following three tabs in the “Fixed Assets – Postings” migration object: Posting Key ; Cumulative Values ;Transaction Headers.

We also noticed that the Asset Value Date field exists in the Transaction Items tab, which we did not initially complete. We did tests by filling in this tab, but encountered errors due to the Asset Transaction Type 970 (Asset Data Transfer) we used.

Is there another asset transaction type that should be used for mid-year data migrations ? Please suggest an alternative solution if possible.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Mass update check rule for the business partners.
entry.content:
We recently enabled credit management BP Role for 5000 customers (In Production System), in "Credit profile" check rule we kept wrongly as "01" instead of "02" and we don't have this filed to mass update.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Multiple Billing Document Attachments in Single Email Transmission
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Is it possible to group multiple Billing Documents (PDF Attachments) for the same customer in a single email output transmission?

entry.title: Product Allocation Not appreaing in Availability check Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to execute the product allocation in S4 HANA sales Public cloud, and I have completed all the steps 

  1. Configure Product allocation 
  2. Manage Product Allocation Sequence
  3. Product allocation planning data
  4. Assign Product to product allocation 

I have even enabled PAL in CBC. But still, during the sales Order Processing, no object appears
